items.title: You don't have to love or hate the NBA's Apron Era
items.body_excerpt: The NBA has had a massive paradigm shift in the past few years, and it's impacting every team in the league and most players. It's led to increased parity and hope among the miserable, and it's breaking up fun teams. All things are true. Good morning. It's Free Newsletter…

items.title: What if they don't get LeBron?
items.body_excerpt: There's obviously been a lot of talk about LeBron James' potential destination this offseason. Where will he go, where should he go, what will his future team look like if and when he does sign there, etc. There's been less talk, rightfully so, about what those teams will look…

items.title: QB Rankings and the Brock Purdy Secret Hidden in Plain Sight
items.body_excerpt: With NFL Training Camp suddenly here, the league-sourced top-10 lists that get fanbases whining are out. More so than the other sports, football produces a lot of insider-informed, prestige media-published rankings. One reason there’s a demand for this is the sport is known to…
